definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">game</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">ban</field><field name="comment">是否封禁玩家 Whether to ban the player</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">ban</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">crash</field><field name="comment">是否崩溃 Whether it has crashed</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">crash</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">event_interval</field><field name="comment">事件发生的间隔 The interval at the time of the event</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">event_interval</field><field name="value">100000</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">run_exe</field><field name="comment">是否允许运行exe文件 Whether to allow running exe files</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">run_exe</field><field name="value">false</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
